docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-21-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-22-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-2212016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
